postalAddress.value: Selwyn Electorate Office: Shop 34, Rolleston Square, 9 Masefield Drive, Rolleston 7614
postalAddress.notes: National Party contact page lists electorate office and a Parliamentary Office address (1 Molesworth Street, Pipitea, Wellington 6011).

aiInvolvement.notes: Quick scan of available public profile/contact pages did not mention AI or artificial intelligence.

sourcesChecked.notes: Found Selwyn electorate office postal address (and parliamentary office address).
